title: Looker Dashboard
description: Schema for a Looker dashboard object as returned by the Looker API 4.0. A dashboard is a collection of tiles (elements) displaying visualizations from queries, organized in a grid layout with optional cross-filtering capabilities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the dashboard. Numeric string for user-defined dashboards; model::dashboard_name format for LookML dashboards.

title.description: Display title of the dashboard shown in the UI and navigation

description.description: Optional description explaining the dashboard's purpose and the data it presents

content_metadata_id.description: ID of the content metadata record that controls access and sharing settings

query_timezone.description: Timezone applied to all queries on this dashboard. When set, overrides individual query timezones. Uses IANA timezone format (e.g. America/Los_Angeles).

space_id.description: ID of the space (folder) containing this dashboard

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this dashboard

user_id.description: ID of the Looker user who created this dashboard

space.description: Summary of the space containing this dashboard

folder.description: Summary of the folder containing this dashboard

dashboard_elements.description: Tiles on this dashboard, each containing a query visualization, a Look reference, or text content

dashboard_filters.description: Filters on this dashboard that allow users to dynamically adjust query parameters across tiles

dashboard_layouts.description: Layout configurations defining tile positions and sizes in the dashboard grid

background_color.description: CSS background color for the dashboard canvas

text_tile_text_color.description: Default text color for text-type tiles

tile_background_color.description: Default background color for all tiles

tile_text_color.description: Default text color for all tiles

hidden.description: Whether the dashboard is hidden from navigation menus and search results

readonly.description: Whether the dashboard is read-only. LookML dashboards are always read-only.

refresh_interval.description: Auto-refresh interval for the dashboard (e.g. '5 minutes', '1 hour', '30 seconds')

load_configuration.description: Controls how tiles are loaded. Options control concurrent vs sequential tile loading.

preferred_viewer.description: Preferred viewer type for rendering the dashboard

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the dashboard was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the dashboard was last modified

deleted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the dashboard was soft-deleted, or null if active

deleted.description: Whether the dashboard has been soft-deleted (moved to trash)

last_accessed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the dashboard was last viewed by any user

view_count.description: Total number of times the dashboard has been viewed

favorite_count.description: Number of users who have added this dashboard to their favorites

url.description: Relative URL path for accessing this dashboard in the Looker UI

model.description: LookML model associated with this dashboard (for LookML dashboards)

DashboardElement.description: A single tile on a dashboard. Each element displays a query visualization, references a saved Look, shows text/markdown content, or acts as a filter control.

id.description: Unique identifier for this dashboard element

look_id.description: ID of the Look displayed in this tile, or null if the tile uses an inline query

query_id.description: ID of the query executed by this tile, or null if the tile references a Look

title_hidden.description: Whether the tile title is hidden from display

subtitle_text.description: Subtitle text displayed below the title

body_text.description: Body text content for text-type elements, supports markdown

note_text.description: Note text displayed as an annotation on the tile

note_display.description: Position of the note relative to the tile

result_maker.description: Result maker configuration for merge queries combining multiple queries

rich_content_json.description: JSON string containing rich text content configuration

query.description: Embedded query definition for this tile

DashboardFilter.description: A dashboard filter that allows users to dynamically change query parameters across multiple tiles simultaneously.

name.description: Internal name used to reference this filter in tile configurations

title.description: Display title shown to users in the filter bar

type.description: The input type of the filter, determining the UI control rendered

model.description: LookML model name for field_filter type filters

explore.description: LookML explore name for field_filter type filters

dimension.description: LookML dimension name for field_filter type filters

default_value.description: Default value applied when the dashboard is first loaded

allow_multiple_values.description: Whether users can select multiple filter values

required.description: Whether the filter must have a value before the dashboard loads

row.description: Row position of the filter in the filter bar layout

listens_to_filters.description: Names of other dashboard filters that this filter listens to for cascading filter behavior

DashboardLayout.description: A layout configuration that defines the grid-based positioning of tiles on a dashboard.

active.description: Whether this is the currently active layout

column_width.description: Width of each column in the layout grid

width.description: Total width of the layout in grid units

dashboard_layout_components.description: Components defining the position and size of each tile in the grid

DashboardLayoutComponent.description: Defines the position and size of a single tile within a dashboard layout grid.

id.description: Unique identifier for this layout component

dashboard_layout_id.description: ID of the parent dashboard layout

dashboard_element_id.description: ID of the dashboard element this component positions

row.description: Row position in the layout grid (zero-indexed)

column.description: Column position in the layout grid (zero-indexed)

width.description: Width of the tile in grid units

height.description: Height of the tile in grid units

QuerySummary.description: Summary of a query definition associated with a dashboard element.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for this query

fields.description: List of field names included in the query

filters.description: Key-value map of filter expressions where keys are field names

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return

vis_config.description: Visualization configuration controlling chart type, colors, axes, and other display settings

LookModel.description: Basic LookML model information associated with a dashboard.
